mnemonics: FARM: Feedback, Assessment, Reflection, Monitoring - The four pillars of CIE.
keyPoints: CIE is an ongoing process of assessment throughout the semester, not just a single event.
Its primary purpose is formative, aiming to provide feedback for improvement rather than just a summative grade.
It includes a variety of tools like quizzes, assignments, presentations, and class participation to gauge student progress.
commonMistakes: Confusing CIE with only mid-term exams; it encompasses all continuous assessments.
Focusing solely on the marks/grades and ignoring the developmental feedback provided.
Procrastinating on CIE tasks, as they are cumulative and contribute significantly to the final grade.
